message:
fix: route tracing logs to stderr instead of stdout

This fixes JSON output contamination where INFO log lines were being
mixed with JSON search results, breaking JSON parsing in scripts.

- Update main.rs tracing_subscriber to use stderr writer
- Update logging.rs all format variants to use stderr closures

This ensures that machine-readable output (JSON, CSV) on stdout is
not polluted by human-readable log messages.

Closes: xf-46 (partial - logging fix only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
